name: Midjourney
description: An independent research lab exploring new mediums of thought and expanding the imaginative powers of the human species.
overview: Midjourney is a generative AI program and service created and hosted by a San Francisco-based independent research lab. Midjourney generates images from natural language descriptions, called 'prompts', similar to OpenAI's DALL-E and Stable Diffusion.
cons: Steep learning curve for advanced prompting
